lesson.title: 1.7 RECREATIONAL GAMES AND ACTIVITIES
topics: Recreational games are a structured form of play, usually undertaken for enjoyment, relaxation,
and sometimes competition. They can be physical, mental, or a combination of both, and are
activities: Recreational games are a structured form of play, usually undertaken for enjoyment, relaxation,
and sometimes competition. They can be physical, mental, or a combination of both, and are
primarily for fun, fitness, relaxation, and social interaction rather than for serious competition.
They are an important part of physical education and holistic development, providing opportunities
for learners to engage in enjoyable movement-based experiences.
development. They serve as a stress reliever and create an engaging way for individuals to stay
active and healthy. Recreational games also help foster essential life skills such as teamwork,
resources: Step Platforms, Workout Mats, Proper Footwear, Music System, Fitness Tracker,
hoops, ropes, resistance bands, dumb bells, cones markers… (locally improvised mate­
rials; fiber, bottles, self-made balls bean balls…)
